expected_deltas.content: The automated fraud-detection threshold for new payment methods was lowered, increasing the rate of manual verification
expected_deltas.source_span: the automated fraud-detection threshold for new payment methods has been lowered, meaning transactions that previously passed automatically now require additional verification more often

expected_deltas.content: Increased manual verification volume has extended payout clearing time from same-day to 2-3 business days
expected_deltas.source_span: the average time to clear a payout for affected accounts has increased from same-day to 2-3 business days, and the manual review queue has grown accordingly
expected_deltas.note: Cause stated in paragraph 1, effect stated in paragraph 4, with an unrelated FAQ-update paragraph in between acting as a distractor. Tests whether the pipeline mistakenly links the effect to the FAQ paragraph (adjacent) instead of the actual cause (two paragraphs back).
